cooking_method: ['Wash rice and lentils separately until water runs clear.', 'In a pressure cooker, heat ghee and sauté onions until golden.', 'Add garlic, ginger, and spices, cook for 2 minutes.', 'Add tomatoes and cook until soft.', 'Add lentils and water, pressure cook for 15 minutes.', 'In another pot, cook rice with 2 cups water until done.', 'Temper with cumin seeds and garlic in hot oil.', 'Pour tempering over dal, garnish with coriander.', 'Serve hot dal with rice and pickles.']

cooking_method: ['Rinse chiura briefly, drain and fluff with fingers.', 'Heat oil, add cumin seeds until they splutter.', 'Add peanuts, roast until golden.', 'Add onions and green chilies, sauté until translucent.', 'Add turmeric and salt.', 'Add chiura, mix gently on low heat.', 'Cook for 3-4 minutes until heated through.', 'Garnish with coriander, serve hot or at room temp.']

cooking_method: ['Pressure cook chickpeas until tender.', 'Heat oil, sauté onions until golden brown.', 'Add ginger-garlic paste, cook for 2 minutes.', 'Add tomato puree and spices, cook until oil separates.', 'Add cooked chickpeas with some cooking water.', 'Simmer for 10-15 minutes until gravy thickens.', 'Add garam masala, mix well.', 'Garnish with coriander, serve hot with puri or rice.']
ingredients: ['2 cups chickpeas (soaked overnight)', '2 onions, finely chopped', '2 tomatoes, pureed', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon garam masala', '2 tablespoons oil', 'Fresh coriander for garnish']
tags: Vegetarian, Main Course, Protein Rich, Traditional

cooking_method: ['Boil noodles according to package, drain and set aside.', 'Heat oil in wok on high heat.', 'Add mushrooms, stir-fry until browned.', 'Add vegetables, stir-fry until crisp-tender.', 'Add all sauces, mix well.', 'Add cooked noodles, toss everything together.', 'Cook for 2-3 minutes on high heat.', 'Garnish with spring onions, serve hot.']
ingredients: ['400g noodles', '300g mushrooms, sliced', '2 cups mixed vegetables', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 tablespoon oyster sauce (optional)', '1 tablespoon chili garlic sauce', '2 tablespoons oil', 'Spring onions for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Wash and dry mangoes thoroughly, cut into cubes.', 'Sun dry mango pieces for 2-3 hours.', 'Mix all dry spices together.', 'Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool completely.', 'Mix mango pieces with spice mixture.', 'Add cooled mustard oil, mix thoroughly.', 'Store in sterilized glass jars.', 'Keep in sunlight for 7 days before using.']
ingredients: ['10 raw mangoes, cubed', '1 cup mustard oil', '1/2 cup mustard seeds, ground', '1/4 cup fenugreek seeds, ground', '1/4 cup chili powder', '1/4 cup salt', '2 tablespoons turmeric', 'Glass jars for storage']

cooking_method: ['Peel hard-boiled eggs, make shallow slits on surface.', 'Heat oil, sauté onion paste until golden.', 'Add ginger-garlic paste, cook for 2 minutes.', 'Add tomato puree and spices, cook until oil separates.', 'Add water to make gravy, bring to simmer.', 'Add eggs, cook for 5-7 minutes.', 'Gently turn eggs to coat with gravy.', 'Serve hot with rice or roti.']
ingredients: ['6 hard-boiled eggs', '2 onions, ground to paste', '2 tomatoes, pureed', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '1 teaspoon coriander powder', '2 tablespoons oil']
tags: Vegetarian, Main Course, Protein Rich, Quick

cooking_method: ['Bring water to boil with spices.', 'Add tea leaves, boil for 2-3 minutes.', 'Add milk and bring to boil.', 'Reduce heat and simmer for 3-4 minutes.', 'Add sugar, stir until dissolved.', 'Strain into cups.', 'Can be served with biscuits or snacks.', 'Best served hot.']
ingredients: ['4 cups water', '4 teaspoons black tea leaves', '2 cups milk', '4 teaspoons sugar', '4 cardamom pods, crushed', '1 inch ginger, grated', '4 cloves', '1 cinnamon stick']

cooking_method: ['Steam momos as usual, let them cool slightly.', 'Cut each momo into halves or quarters.', 'In a bowl, mix onions, tomatoes, and green chilies.', 'Add mustard oil, timur powder, and soy sauce.', 'Add chopped momos to the mixture.', 'Toss everything together gently.', 'Let it sit for 10 minutes for flavors to meld.', 'Garnish with coriander, serve as snack.']
ingredients: ['20 steamed momos', '1 onion, thinly sliced', '2 tomatoes, chopped', '2 green chilies, chopped', '1 tablespoon mustard oil', '1 teaspoon timur powder', '1 tablespoon soy sauce', 'Fresh coriander for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Marinate prawns with turmeric and salt for 15 minutes.', 'Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool slightly.', 'Sauté onion paste until golden brown.', 'Add ginger-garlic paste, cook for 2 minutes.', 'Add tomato puree and spices, cook until oil separates.', 'Add prawns, cook for 3-4 minutes on each side.', 'Add water for gravy, simmer for 5 minutes.', 'Garnish with coriander, serve hot with rice.']
ingredients: ['500g prawns, cleaned and deveined', '2 onions, ground to paste', '2 tomatoes, pureed', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon chili powder', '1 teaspoon cumin powder', '2 tablespoons mustard oil']

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, add cumin seeds until they splutter.', 'Add onions, sauté until translucent.', 'Add tomatoes and green chilies, cook until soft.', 'Add turmeric and salt.', 'Add pumpkin cubes, mix well.', 'Add water, cover and simmer until pumpkin is tender.', 'Mash some pumpkin pieces to thicken gravy.', 'Garnish with coriander, serve hot with rice.']
ingredients: ['500g pumpkin, cubed', '1 onion, chopped', '2 tomatoes, chopped', '2 green chilies, slit', '1 teaspoon turmeric', '1 teaspoon cumin seeds', '2 tablespoons oil', 'Fresh coriander for garnish']
tags: Vegetarian, Main Course, Seasonal, Comfort Food

cooking_method: ['Heat oil, scramble eggs, remove and set aside.', 'Stir-fry chicken/vegetables until cooked.', 'Add vegetables, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.', 'Add cooked rice, break up any clumps.', 'Add soy sauce and vinegar, mix well.', 'Add scrambled eggs back to rice.', 'Toss everything together on high heat.', 'Garnish with spring onions, serve hot.']
ingredients: ['3 cups cooked rice (preferably day old)', '200g chicken or vegetables', '2 eggs, beaten', '1 cup mixed vegetables', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 tablespoon vinegar', '2 tablespoons oil', 'Spring onions for garnish']
tags: Non-Vegetarian, Main Course, Quick, Chinese Fusion

cooking_method: ['Make dough with flour and water, rest for 30 minutes.', 'Wash dough in water until starch separates.', 'Let starch water settle overnight.', 'Pour off clear water, use starch to make sheets.', 'Steam starch sheets until translucent.', 'Cut into strips or roll with filling.', 'Make sauce with soy sauce, vinegar, and chili oil.', 'Serve cold with sauce and garnishes.']
ingredients: ['2 cups all-purpose flour', 'Water for dough', '2 tablespoons soy sauce', '1 tablespoon vinegar', '1 tablespoon chili oil', '1 teaspoon Sichuan pepper', 'Garlic chutney', 'Spring onions for garnish']
tags: Vegetarian, Street Food, Cold Noodles, Spicy

cooking_method: ['Marinate meat with yogurt and half spices for 2 hours.', 'Heat mustard oil until smoking, then cool slightly.', 'Add whole spices, sauté until fragrant.', 'Add sliced onions, fry until dark brown and crispy.', 'Add ginger-garlic paste, cook for 2 minutes.', 'Add marinated meat, cook on high heat for 5 minutes.', 'Add water, cover and simmer until meat is tender.', 'Garnish with fried onions and coriander.']
ingredients: ['500g meat (goat or buffalo)', '3 onions, thinly sliced', '2 tablespoons mustard oil', '1 tablespoon ginger-garlic paste', '2 tablespoons yogurt', 'Whole spices (cardamom, cinnamon, cloves)', 'Fresh coriander for garnish']

cooking_method: ['Wash, peel, and grate carrots', 'Heat ghee in a pan and sauté grated carrots', 'Add milk and cook until milk reduces', 'Add sugar and stir continuously', 'Mix in cardamom powder and chopped nuts', 'Cook until thick and aromatic']
ingredients: ['500g carrots', '1 liter milk', '4 tablespoons ghee', '1/2 cup sugar', '1 teaspoon cardamom powder', 'Cashews and almonds']

cooking_method: ['Boil milk until slightly thick', 'Add soaked rice and cook slowly', 'Stir continuously to avoid sticking', 'Add sugar and cardamom powder', 'Garnish with raisins and nuts']
ingredients: ['1 liter milk', '1/2 cup rice', '1/2 cup sugar', 'Cardamom powder', 'Raisins', 'Cashews']

cooking_method: ['Mix flour, yogurt, and water into batter', 'Ferment batter for several hours', 'Pipe spirals into hot oil and fry until crisp', 'Dip fried jalebi in sugar syrup']
ingredients: ['2 cups flour', '1 cup yogurt', 'Sugar syrup', 'Oil for frying', 'Saffron']

cooking_method: ['Mix milk powder, flour, and baking soda', 'Prepare soft dough with milk', 'Shape into small balls', 'Deep fry until golden brown', 'Soak in warm sugar syrup']
ingredients: ['Milk powder', 'Flour', 'Milk', 'Sugar syrup', 'Cardamom']
